name: Fo Me Bo Co
description_short: Rates and Info is a rate comparison tool for banks, credit unions, and online banks, helping consumers find highest-yielding savings accounts, CDs, mortgages, and loans in their area.
description_long: Rates and Info (ratesandinfo.com) is a financial rate comparison platform designed to help consumers identify the best interest rates and loan terms across multiple financial institutions. The site aggregates current rates for savings products, certificates of deposit (CDs), mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and auto loans, with location-based filtering to show relevant local and online options. The platform displays rates from a diverse array of financial institutions including traditional banks, credit unions, online banks, and mortgage lenders, allowing side-by-side comparison of Annual Percentage Yield (APY), minimum deposit requirements, and loan terms. What distinguishes Rates and Info is its focus on rate transparency and accessibility—users can filter by location (the site shows Honolulu, HI as an example) and product type to identify the highest-yielding options available to them, making it easier to compare hundreds of potential providers at once rather than visiting individual websites. The platform includes educational content explaining financial terminology like APY and Truth in Savings regulations. However, it's important to note that Rates and Info is a rate comparison aggregator, not a direct lender or financial institution itself—it does not issue accounts, process loans, or hold customer deposits. The site generates revenue through advertiser disclosures and partnerships with featured lenders.
services: Savings account rate comparison and search
Certificate of Deposit (CD) rate comparison (12-month and 24-month terms)
Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) rate comparison
Advertiser disclosure and transparency on featured lenders
Financial education content on APY and savings terminology
Branch search functionality for banks and credit unions
Minimum deposit requirement disclosure for savings products
pros: Aggregates rates from 50+ banks, credit unions, and online lenders in one searchable platform
Location-based filtering shows rates relevant to user's geographic area (e.g., Honolulu, HI)
Displays minimum deposit/loan requirements alongside APY for easy qualification assessment
Covers multiple product categories: savings accounts, CDs (12-month and 24-month), mortgages, HELOCs, and auto loans
Includes educational content explaining financial terminology and savings regulations
Shows rates from diverse institution types: traditional banks, credit unions, online banks, and mortgage lenders
Updated rate data (some listings show recent update dates like 2026-04-16)
cons: Rates and Info is not a lender—users cannot open accounts directly; must visit featured lenders' websites
Does not appear to offer personalized rate quotes or pre-qualification tools beyond rate display
Limited transparency on how frequently rates are updated; some listings lack update timestamps
Relies on advertiser relationships, which may influence which lenders receive prominent placement
No comparison of fees, terms, or customer service quality beyond basic rate and minimum deposit information
best_for: Consumers shopping for the highest savings rates across multiple banks and credit unions simultaneously
Home buyers and refinancers comparing mortgage rates from 20+ lenders at once
Savers looking for CD laddering options with clear APY and minimum deposit comparisons
Borrowers seeking home equity lines of credit, auto loans, and other credit products with transparent rate display
diagnosis: Rates and Info is best for consumers who want to quickly compare interest rates and loan terms across 50+ financial institutions without visiting each lender's website individually. The main caveat is that this is a comparison aggregator, not a lender—users must apply directly with featured institutions, and advertiser relationships may influence which lenders are prominently displayed.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Fo Me Bo Co — Credit Union in WABASH, IN | CreditDoc
meta_description: Fo Me Bo Co — NCUA-insured credit union in WABASH, IN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
